description: Real-time X/Twitter crowd sentiment analysis for BTC, ETH, SOL, WTI, NVDA, or TSLA — delivered as structured JSON with signal (BULLISH/BEARISH/NEUTRAL), confidence %, key themes, and a contrarian flag when crowd positioning is extreme. Powered by Grok live data. Agent-ready output, no parsing needed.
what_it_delivers: JSON object: { asset, signal, confidence_pct, crowd_positioning, key_themes: [], contrarian_flag: bool, contrarian_note: string, timestamp }. Example: BTC sentiment BULLISH 75%, long-heavy crowd, contrarian_flag: true (crowd overleveraged, correction risk elevated).
